contentBlocks.original:
सिङ्गार वेल सकलेश्वर दीनबन्धो ।
सन्तापनाशन सनातन शक्तिहस्त
श्रीकार्तिकेय मम देहि करावलम्बम् ॥ 1
contentBlocks.transliteration:
siṅgāra vēla sakalēśvara dīnabandhō ।
santāpanāśana sanātana śaktihasta
śrīkārtikēya mama dēhi karāvalambam ॥ 1
contentBlocks.translation: O auspicious Vēla (divine spear), O lord of all (sakalēśvara), O friend of the helpless (dīnabandhu), O destroyer of all afflictions (santāpanāśana), O eternal one (sanātana), O holder of the Śakti (śaktihasta) — O Śrī Kārtikeya, give me the support of your hand (mama dēhi karāvalambam)!

contentBlocks.original:
पञ्चाद्रिवास सहजा सुरसैन्यनाथ
पञ्चामृतप्रिय गुह सकलाधिवास ।
गङ्गेन्दु मौलि तनय मयिल्वाहनस्थ
श्रीकार्तिकेय मम देहि करावलम्बम् ॥ 2
contentBlocks.transliteration:
pañchādrivāsa sahajā surasainyanātha
pañchāmṛtapriya guha sakalādhivāsa ।
gaṅgēndu mauḻi tanaya mayilvāhanastha
śrīkārtikēya mama dēhi karāvalambam ॥ 2
contentBlocks.translation: O dweller on the five sacred mountains (pañchādrivāsa), O elder brother born together with Gaṇēśa (sahajā), O commander of the divine army (surasainyanātha), O Guha who loves the five nectars (pañchāmṛtapriya), O all-pervading inner dweller (sakalādhivāsa), O son of Śiva who wears the Gaṅgā and moon as his crown (gaṅgēndu mauḻi tanaya) — O Śrī Kārtikeya, give me the support of your hand!

contentBlocks.original:
आपद्विनाशक कुमारक चारुमूर्ते
तापत्रयान्तक दायापर तारकारे ।
आर्ताऽभयप्रद गुणत्रय भव्यराशे
श्रीकार्तिकेय मम देहि करावलम्बम् ॥ 3
contentBlocks.transliteration:
āpadvināśaka kumāraka chārumūrtē
tāpatrayāntaka dāyāpara tārakārē ।
ārtā'bhayaprada guṇatraya bhavyarāśē
śrīkārtikēya mama dēhi karāvalambam ॥ 3
contentBlocks.translation: O destroyer of calamities (āpadvināśaka), O youthful Kumāra of beautiful form (kumāraka chārumūrtē), O ender of the three kinds of suffering (tāpatrayāntaka), O ocean of compassion (dāyāpara), O enemy and slayer of Tāraka (tārakārē), O granter of refuge and fearlessness to the distressed (ārtā'bhayaprada), O transcendent beyond the three guṇas (guṇatrayatīta) — O Śrī Kārtikeya, give me the support of your hand!

contentBlocks.original:
वल्लीपते सुकृतदायक पुण्यमूर्ते
स्वर्लोकनाथ परिसेवित शम्भु सूनो ।
त्रैलोक्यनायक षडानन भूतपाद
श्रीकार्तिकेय मम देहि करावलम्बम् ॥ 4
contentBlocks.transliteration:
vallīpatē sukṛtadāyaka puṇyamūrtē
svarlōkanātha parisēvita śambhu sūnō ।
trailōkyanāyaka ṣaḍānana bhūtapāda
śrīkārtikēya mama dēhi karāvalambam ॥ 4
contentBlocks.translation: O lord of Vaḷḷī (vallīpate), O granter of the fruits of good deeds (sukṛtadāyaka), O sacred form (puṇyamūrtē), O lord of the heavens served by all (svarlōkanātha parisēvita), O son of Śambhu (śambhu sūno), O ruler of all three worlds (trailōkyanāyaka), O six-faced lord (ṣaḍānana) — O Śrī Kārtikeya, give me the support of your hand!

contentBlocks.original:
ज्ञानस्वरूप सकलात्मक वेदवेद्य
ज्ञानप्रियाऽखिलदुरन्त महावनघ्ने ।
दीनवनप्रिय निरमय दानसिन्धो
श्रीकार्तिकेय मम देहि करावलम्बम् ॥ 5
contentBlocks.transliteration:
jñānasvarūpa sakalātmaka vēdavēdya
jñānapriyā'khiladuranta mahāvanaghnē ।
dīnavanapriya niramaya dānasindhō
śrīkārtikēya mama dēhi karāvalambam ॥ 5
contentBlocks.translation: O embodiment of divine wisdom (jñānasvarūpa), O all-pervading self of all beings (sakalātmaka), O known through the Vedas (vēdavēdya), O lover of wisdom (jñānapriya), O destroyer of the great thick forests of all calamities (ākhiladuranta mahāvanaghnē), O protector of the humble (dīnavanapriya), O formless one (nirañjana) — O Śrī Kārtikeya, give me the support of your hand!
Thus ends the Śrī Kārtikeya Karāvalamba Stotram.
